title: Sulfur cubes
description: This mod adds sulfur cubes for minecraft 1.21.11
body:
I added the Sulfur Cube to Minecraft early.

It currently spawns in caves. You can right-click a block onto it to stop it from moving. If the block is wool, iron, or ice, it changes how the cube moves—causing effects like sliding, falling faster, or falling slower.

The block inside the cube can be removed using shears. If a large variant is killed, it splits into two smaller ones. These smaller cubes can grow into large ones after 20 minutes. Large Sulfur Cubes cannot be damaged while they have a block inside them.
